description.en: A floating-point “not a number” (NaN) value. Equivalent to float('nan'). See also math.nan. Added in version 3.6.

excerpt.es: A floating-point “not a number” (NaN) value. Equivalent to float('nan'). See also math.nan. Added in version 3.6.
excerpt.en: A floating-point “not a number” (NaN) value. Equivalent to float('nan'). See also math.nan. Added in version 3.6.

description.en: Complex number with zero real part and NaN imaginary part. Equivalent to complex(0.0, float('nan')). Added in version 3.6.

excerpt.es: Complex number with zero real part and NaN imaginary part. Equivalent to complex(0.0, float('nan')). Added in version 3.6.
excerpt.en: Complex number with zero real part and NaN imaginary part. Equivalent to complex(0.0, float('nan')). Added in version 3.6.
